title: Aomori, Aomori — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Aomori, Aomori: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Aomori is a city in Aomori with a population of 280,000. The northernmost prefectural capital on Honshu, famous for its apple orchards, Nebuta Festival, and snowy winters.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
